THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-NIKAIDO_HIRO:
In the name of correctness, I hereby declare —
you are the source of all evil in this world.

Correctness?
Have you come here to judge me, little girl?

This is not judgment. It is correction.
This tower, this corruption, this whole mistaken order you built — I will return it all to its correct form.

Go back to the bottom of the tower, stubborn child.
Your [jitter][red]"correctness"[/red][/jitter] is worthless here.

I have returned.
This time, I will complete this judgment.

You again?
Climbing here again and again with the power to return from death. Do you not find that pathetic?

No matter how many times I start over, I will stand here.
Your evil deeds will be brought to account.

Your so-called justice
is nothing more than self-righteousness built on countless deaths.

You defined this world
and then allowed chaos and slaughter to fester. You are the sinner most deserving execution.

What would you know of order?
You cannot even uphold your own [jitter][red]"correctness"[/red][/jitter], yet you presume to accuse me?

I will not let any more lives
be wasted by your arrogance and obsession.

Heh.
You are as foolish and overconfident as the woman who poisoned me.
I will judge your sins with my own hands.

Then show me
whether this so-called judgment of yours has enough weight to wound me.

Have you exhausted even your arguments?
Or have you finally understood that [jitter][red]words mean nothing[/red][/jitter]?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-HIKAMI_MERUR:
Please... help me.
You can bring her back, can you not?

Another child who stained both hands with blood
for the sake of an obsession.

I only want to see the Great Witch again...
No matter the cost.

Being abandoned is unpleasant, is it not?
I do not repair pasts long since broken for foolish obsessions.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-JOGASAKI_NOA:
Waaah — finally made it!
Is this the very top of the tower?
The air is so dry. Noah does not like it here much —

...Another person who knows nothing of creation stands before me.
Who are you?

Noah is an artist! I heard you created this whole world...
Did you draw all those things too?
How did you make a perfect work?
Teach Noah —

Creation is not a game.
Do you think it is a scribble on a canvas?

...Destroying your understanding is not my purpose.
Leave.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-TACHIBANA_SH:
Wow! So you are the real culprit behind this tower, right?
Great Detective Sherry has finally found the truth of the case!

The truth is merely a dull little drama
stitched together by a child seeking amusement.

It is not dull at all!
This is the greatest case in history!

Go back to the bottom of the tower.
My creations were never toys for your amusement.
Ahaha... I am not very used to scenes like this.
Do not stare at me so directly.

...A strange disguise, a stable soul, a self-proclaimed harmlessness.
You are interesting.

Interesting? Someone as minor as me is not worth your notice.
Could you pretend you never saw me?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-TONO_HANNA.0:
As a proper young lady, I should offer an elegant greeting before negotiations...
You may call me Hanna. May I ask, are you the 'master' of this tower?

A noble young lady?
Nothing more than a self-deceiving dream woven from lies.

...How rude!
Can you not hear a lady greeting you!?

Go back to the bottom of the tower.
I do not fabricate false happiness for children who flee reality.
I came here to demand the spotlight that belongs to me alone.
The creator of this world should give the brightest protagonist the attention she deserves.

An actress? There is no audience here, no applause, and no one watching you.
You have no meaning here.

I do not need an audience.
This tower took everything from me, but it could never take my body or mind.
My very existence is a stage powerful enough to hold your gaze.

...What a pitiful obsession.
Do you think confidence alone can shake the order of this tower?
Your radiance has no value here.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-KUROBE_NANOK:
I have seen your past,
and I have seen the cycle of slaughter you created.

A child who survives by peeking into memories
dares to criticize the order I created?

With this shot,
I will end every predetermined conclusion.

Then let me see whether that bullet of yours
can pierce the past and future I have decreed.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-HOSHO_MAGO.0:
My, my. So this is the god who created the whole world?
How unexpectedly ordinary.

A child full of lies,
unable even to deceive her own heart,
thinks herself fit to mock me?

After all, in this world,
there was never any sincerity to speak of.

Your so-called love is merely a clumsy imitation of possessiveness.
Go back to the bottom of the tower, fraud.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA-NATSUME_ANAN:
I beseech you here.
Can you erase this cursed magic and free me from this cage?

And now you wish to erase the sins you committed?
How laughable.

I simply...
do not want anyone else to become unhappy.
You lack even the courage to face your past, yet you ask me for liberation?
Hey, you up there.
Did you build this damn tower?
Are you the so-called 'creator'?

You and this tower are the same.
Always coming to me filled with anger and confusion.

Cut the crap.
Either crush me now, or get burned to ash. Stop spouting those pretty words that make me sick.
If you want judgment, you have come to the wrong place.
